name: Helicopter-Harness
description: Parent-workspace AI development harness for multi-repo, multi-agent engineering work. Gives local coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, generic) a shared source of truth: protocols, repo profiles, state tracking, optional hooks, and adapter instructions.
purpose: Parent-level, tool-neutral AI development harness for one workspace containing many repos and many coding agents.

tool_specific_hooks: Claude Code SessionStart example in hooks/examples/
